name: RAJASTHANI MIRCHI VADA
intro: Those not-so-spicy, not-so-mild chillies are just perfect for this dish that goes best with garam chai. This is a pakoda, but what makes it a little more mature is the vada-like potato stuffing that the slit chillies are filled with before being batter-fried.
method: In a bowl, mix the potatoes with the spicy peanuts, coriander powder, red chilli powder, dry mango powder, fennel seed powder, chaat masala, lemon juice, coriander leaves and salt. Mash well.
Fill this mixture into the slit chillies; you may choose to keep the seeds, or discard them.
In a bowl, mix the chickpea flour with water and whisk to form a thick pancake-like batter.
Dip the stuffed chillies into this batter and deep fry the vadas in hot oil for 3-4 minutes.
